violations.text: A soap and paper towel dispenser was observed at the mop sink. Hand washing aids must only be at a hand washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

A to-go container is being used as scoops in containers of cheese. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. PIC removed to-go item at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
